data.title: Tavant recognized as Major Player in IDC MarketScape for AI-Enabled Aftermarket Solutions; position confirmed in report for 2025.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, Tavant, a renowned company specializing in AI-driven service life-cycle management solutions and digital engineering, has been identified as a Major Player in the highly respected IDC MarketScape report titled Worldwide AI-Enabled Aftermarket/Service Life-Cycle Management Platforms 2025 Vendor Assessment (document number: US52968025, released in September 2025). This recognition highlights Tavant's outstanding AI technology advancements and a wide-ranging suite of aftermarket services, catering to a diverse customer base.

data.title: UKG and Google Cloud team up to enhance AI for millions of users globally. Google Cloud to provide AI and data analytics.
data.description: In Lowell, Massachusetts, and Sunnyvale, California, UKG and Google Cloud have unveiled a significant enhancement of their partnership to promote the use of advanced AI among the large user base of UKG’s HR, payroll, and workforce management tools. This collaboration aims to empower the tens of millions of users by harnessing Google Cloud's AI and data analytics capabilities. UKG will utilize Gemini Enterprise, Gemini models, and BigQuery as its key tools to enhance UKG BryteTM AI agents throughout its Workforce Operating Platform, assisting organizations in improving efficiency and decision-making processes with cutting-edge technology.

data.title: Momentus receives $5.1M contract from NASA for space mission supporting materials production advancement.
data.description: Momentus Inc., a commercial space company based in San Jose, California, recently disclosed that it secured a $5.1 million contract from NASA's Flight Opportunities program on September 26. The contract aims to aid the Commercial Orbital System for Microgravity In-Space Crystallization (COSMIC) demonstration. This innovative technology harnesses the microgravity conditions in space to progress advancements in various fields. Momentus Inc., listed on the NASDAQ as MNTS, offers a range of services including satellites, satellite components, and in-space transportation.
Verde AgriTech starts drilling at large-scale rare earths find in Minas Gerais, Brazil.

data.title: Developers of Ethereum debut Kohaku roadmap to bolster wallet security & privacy, offering modular tools & decentralized transactions handling.
data.description: Developers for Ethereum have recently launched a new system called Kohaku to bolster wallet security and privacy. This feature includes modular tools, zero-knowledge recovery options, and decentralized transaction processing.

data.title: Primech AI’s HYTRON Robot achieves >99% disinfection efficacy, targeting $76.7B U.S. health market with AI hygiene solutions.
data.description: An independent test found Primech's HYTRON robot to reduce bacteria levels by over 99%. This robot is designed to cater to the $76.7 billion U.S. commercial health market by providing AI-powered hygiene solutions.

data.title: Alliance Entertainment to debut exclusive Handmade by Robots figures at New York Comic Con, featuring iconic characters from brands like Sanrio, Sega, and Godzilla. Over 340,000 unique SKUs supplied to 35,000 retail and e-commerce storefronts.
data.description: Sunrise, Florida - October 9, 2025 - Alliance Entertainment Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: AENT), a leading distributor in the entertainment and pop culture collectibles sector, offers a wide range of more than 340,000 unique products across music, video, video games, licensed merchandise, and exclusive collectibles to over 35,000 retail and e-commerce outlets. The company is excited to present its Handmade by Robots brand at the New York Comic Con from October 9-12 at the Javits Center in New York City. Visitors can explore an exclusive collection of Handmade by Robots figures at the booth, showcasing iconic characters from popular brands like Sanrio, Sega, and Godzilla, alongside special surprises unique to the event.

data.title: VinFast helps Canadians transition to EVs, tackling costs and charging issues. EV market in Canada at 9.2% in Q2 2025.
data.description: In Markham, Ontario, VinFast is addressing the hesitancy of Canadians towards electric vehicles by focusing on cost, charging infrastructure, and minor details critical for driver confidence. Despite efforts, Canada's electric vehicle market is showing a decline, with zero-emission vehicles making up 9.2% of new registrations in the second quarter of 2025. This figure has dropped from 9.7% in the previous quarter and remains significantly lower than the target set for the market.

data.title: Stock futures lower after Fed minutes indicate tariff uncertainty. AMD surges 11%, SPY down 0.0089% at $673.05, PEP up 0.27% premarket. Fed likely to cut rates in October.
data.description: U.S. stock futures fell on Thursday after a mixed close on Wednesday. Benchmark indices were lower, with the Dow Jones down by 0.02%, S&P 500 by 0.07%, Nasdaq 100 by 0.13%, and Russell 2000 by 0.32%. AI stocks like AMD surged by 11% and Micron by 6%. Fed minutes revealed concerns over trade tariffs impacting growth and inflation, as well as interest rate cuts. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.13%, with markets predicting a 94.6% chance of rate cuts in October. SPY and QQQ ETFs tracking S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 fell in premarket. PepsiCo was up 0.27% premarket, with earnings expected at $2.26/share on revenue of $23.83 billion and Turn Therapeutics Inc. surged. Trump announced initial peace plan agreements between Israel and Hamas. Full article on Benzinga.com.
Airship AI exercises warrants for $9.7M, generates gross proceeds.

data.title: Canadian Banc Corp. raises $62.7 million through overnight offering of Preferred Shares (TSX: BK.PR.A) in Toronto.
data.description: In Toronto on October 9, 2025, Canadian Banc Corp. revealed the successful closure of an overnight offering of Preferred Shares (TSX: BK.PR.A), securing total proceeds of $62.7 million.
